user.description: Configure your SpaceAPI endpoint. If you need help with the configuration have a look here: https://github.com/q30-space/ha-spaceapi-endpoint-client

data.api_key: API Key (Optional - Required only to update the space status)

reconfigure.description: Update the SpaceAPI endpoint URL or API key. Adding an API key enables the toggle switch; removing it returns the integration to read-only mode.

data.api_key: API Key (Optional - Required only to update the space status)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with SpaceAPI
reauth_confirm.description: The current API key for {host} was rejected. Enter a new API key.

error.connection: Unable to connect to the SpaceAPI server.
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL format. Must be a valid http:// or https:// URL.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key format. Must be a valid string.

abort.already_configured: This SpaceAPI endpoint is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_unique_id_mismatch: The new host URL conflicts with another configured SpaceAPI endpoint.
